message:
feat(vdbe,core,e2e,types): reduce per-statement overhead on hot paths

VDBE engine:
- Hoist collation registry Mutex lock outside sort_by closures so
  each sort operation acquires the lock once instead of O(n log n)
  times per comparison.
- Change compare_sorter_rows to accept &CollationRegistry directly,
  removing Arc::clone and repeated lock/unlock inside comparators.
- Reuse a scratch Vec<u8> for MakeRecord serialization via new
  serialize_record_iter_into, eliminating per-row Vec allocation.
- Add VdbeProgram::has_insert_ops() to let callers skip work when
  no Insert opcodes are present.

Core connection:
- Thread needs_defaults flag through table_execution_runtime_inputs
  so SELECT/DELETE/UPDATE programs skip expensive recursive
  evaluate_column_default_value calls that were previously paid on
  every statement execution.

E2E executor:
- Normalize simple integer-equality point SELECTs
  (SELECT col FROM tbl WHERE pk = <literal>) into a single
  parameterized prepared statement (WHERE pk = ?1), reducing parser
  churn in differential test replays with thousands of varying
  literal values.
- Add execute_prepared_sql_with_scratch and helper SQL mini-parser
  (consume_ascii_keyword, consume_simple_identifier,
  consume_i64_literal, etc.) for the normalization pass.

Types (record.rs):
- Add serialize_record_iter_into that writes into a caller-supplied
  buffer, reusing its capacity across rows instead of allocating a
  fresh Vec<u8> per MakeRecord invocation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
